_comment: Opportunity: Hidden Medicinal Valley. Per opportunity directive: the engine continuously asks 'what opportunities naturally exist at a location that has existed for 1000 years?'. Discoverable by cultivation (Foundation Establishment), perception (Core Formation (to perceive the formation)), and luck (modifier 1.4). Prime Directive: opportunity exists objectively; player perception determines whether they find it.
name: Hidden Medicinal Valley
description: A valley hidden by formation or terrain, rich in spirit herbs. Exists because: a cultivator or nature created a protected herb garden.
why_untaken: Hidden by formation; requires perception to find.
natural_next_event: Herbs bloom seasonally; valley remains hidden.

simulation_notes.continuous_inference: The World State Engine continuously infers opportunities at every location based on the location's age, type, and history.
simulation_notes.no_locked_upgrades: A cultivator who later reaches the required perception will find opportunities they previously missed; the opportunities do not disappear.
simulation_notes.canon_fidelity: This is how Wang Lin found inheritances throughout his journey — the opportunities existed before he arrived; his perception determined what he found.

karmic_weight.description: No specific karmic consequence recorded in canon
